findings.title: Main report leaks provider names and skill internals into investor-facing prose
findings.recommendation: Name providers in the main body only when they affect interpretation, such as market-cap discrepancies or missing data categories. Move source IDs, local paths, deterministic bundle references, cache details, runtime paths, and routine provider provenance to an appendix, validation artifact, runtime artifact, or JSON sidecar.

findings.title: Validation source resolution misses runtime and deterministic evidence
findings.recommendation: Teach validate_market_research.py to resolve procedural_runtime.sources_file, deterministic source_manifest.json, and existing material_claims.source_artifact paths while preserving the separation between final reports and runtime evidence.

findings.title: Weak deterministic usage rationales create noisy scaffold output
findings.recommendation: Aggregate weak required/review rationale issues in the scaffold while preserving field-level detail in deterministic_data_usage_dispositions.

findings.title: SEC submissions are useful but not normalized into filing index or section extracts
findings.recommendation: Emit normalized/sec_filings_index.json and structured filing-section extraction status or gaps from deterministic_research_collector.py.

findings.title: Sparse procedural context ignores useful deterministic fundamentals
findings.recommendation: Promote selected deterministic facts into procedural research context when procedural sources are sparse.

findings.title: Provider limits and valuation discrepancies require manual impact mapping
findings.recommendation: Emit derived analysis_limitations and discrepancy severity metadata from deterministic collection.

findings.title: Report needs field-level freshness handling for time-sensitive data
findings.recommendation: Use cached durable evidence when source dates are preserved, but require fresh or latest-available handling for price, volume, market cap, short interest, estimates, recent news, insider transactions, and catalysts. Disclose stale or unavailable material data in the report; keep cache mechanics in references, validation artifacts, manifests, or JSON sidecars.

findings.title: Optional environment gaps are discovered late
findings.recommendation: Add an environment preflight script for jsonschema, pandoc, xelatex, and LaTeX package availability.

next_step: Run a separate explicit implementation task using the plan; do not edit production skill files as part of this prompt-only review.
